Completed QA clarification and test alignment for the SPESTG-480 DIA exception notification flow.

Aligned with QA on the DEV-validated scenarios and expected results for demo readiness:
- Missing DIA file after 7 AM NZT
- Valid DIA file happy path
- Valid filename but plain-text / non-encrypted content
- Dataverse staging save failure after retry exhaustion

Also prepared supporting test data and confirmed which runtime evidence can be used for validation, including Function App logs, TPC Log creation, D365 email notification records, and Dataverse staging success/failure behavior.

Remaining validation/demo activities will continue under the validation / retest subtask.
